name: bewareofddog--clawtime-setup
description: Install, configure, start, and troubleshoot ClawTime — a private self-hosted webchat UI for OpenClaw with passkey (Face ID) auth, Piper TTS voice, and 3D avatar. Requires Cloudflare tunnel for HTTPS (passkeys need a real domain). Use when the user wants to install ClawTime on a new machine, configure the tunnel, register a passkey, set up TTS, start/stop the server, or diagnose errors. Triggered by requests like "install clawtime", "set up clawtime", "start clawtime", "clawtime isn't working", "register passkey", "device auth issue".
